title: Wa Islamah
writer: Ali Ahmed Baktheir, Robert Andrews, Youssef El Sebai
actors: Lobna Abdel Aziz, Ahmad Mazhar, Farid Shawqi
plot: Set in the 13th century, under their leader Timur, the Tartar hordes invade the Middle East and take over areas as widespread as Persia, Egypt, and Syria. A lowly woman from a harem rises to lead the Egyptians against the invaders.
